com.github.dakusui.actionunit

Enum Utils

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<Utils>
      • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Utils
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<Utils>

    public enum Utils
extends Enum<Utils>
    A utility class for static methods which are too trivial to create classes to which they should belong.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static TimeUnit chooseTimeUnit(long intervalInNanos) 
      static org.junit.runners.model.TestClass createTestClassMock(org.junit.runners.model.TestClass testClass)
      Creates a TestClass object to mock Parameterized class's logic which cannot be overridden.
      static String describe(Object obj)
      Tries to describe given obj in a best possible way.
      static String describeClassOf(Object obj)

      Returns a method without parameters which has a given methodName from a Class klass.

      static String nonameIfNull(String summary) 
      static Iterable<Integer> range(int stop)
      Equivalent to range(0, stop).
      static Iterable<Integer> range(int start, int stop)
      Equivalent to range(start, stop, 1).
      static Iterable<Integer> range(int start, int stop, int step)
      Returns an iterable object that covers specified range by arguments given to this method.

      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.

      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static Utils[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (Utils c : Utils.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static Utils valueOf(String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        NullPointerException - if the argument is null

        public static <T> T runWithTimeout(Callable<T> callable,
                                   long timeout,
                                   TimeUnit timeUnit)

        public static String shortClassNameOf(Class clazz)

        public static String nonameIfNull(String summary)

      • unknownIfNegative

        public static String unknownIfNegative(int size)

      • sizeOrNegativeIfNonCollection

        public static <T> int sizeOrNegativeIfNonCollection(Iterable<T> iterable)

      • isGivenTypeExpected_ArrayOfExpected_OrIterable

        public static boolean isGivenTypeExpected_ArrayOfExpected_OrIterable(Class<?> expected,
                                                                     Class<?> actual)

      • createTestClassMock

        public static org.junit.runners.model.TestClass createTestClassMock(org.junit.runners.model.TestClass testClass)
        Creates a TestClass object to mock Parameterized class's logic which cannot be overridden.

        Some IDE(s) (IntelliJ, for instance) treat classes that extend Parameterized runner in a special way. And therefore we have to extend it to allow users to use IDE features for parameterized runners.

        Parameters:
        testClass - original test class object.

      • transform

        public static <I,O> Iterable<O> transform(Iterable<I> in,
                                          com.google.common.base.Function<? super I,? extends O> func)

      • range

        public static Iterable<Integer> range(int start,
                                      int stop,
                                      int step)
        Returns an iterable object that covers specified range by arguments given to this method.
        Parameters:
        start - A number from which returned iterable object starts
        stop - A number at which returned iterable object stops
        step - A number by which returned iterable object increases. positive and negative are allowed, but zero is not.

      • range

        public static Iterable<Integer> range(int start,
                                      int stop)
        Equivalent to range(start, stop, 1).
        See Also:
        range(int, int, int)

      • range

        public static Iterable<Integer> range(int stop)
        Equivalent to range(0, stop).
        See Also:
        range(int, int)

      • describe

        public static String describe(Object obj)
        Tries to describe given obj in a best possible way.
        Parameters:
        obj - An object to be described.

      • describeClassOf

        public static String describeClassOf(Object obj)

      • sleep

        public static void sleep(long duration,
                         TimeUnit timeUnit)

      • getMethod

        public static Method getMethod(Class<?> klass,
                               String methodName)
        Returns a method without parameters which has a given methodName from a Class klass.
        Parameters:
        klass - A class from which method is searched.
        methodName - A name of method to be returned.
